topic: My bathroom mirror reflects a wall clock behind me but there is no clock on that wall
title: My Bathroom Mirror Reflects a Clock on the Wall Behind Me That Does Not Exist | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My bathroom mirror reflects a wall clock behind me. There is no clock there.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a bathroom mirror reflecting an old wood framed wall clock with Roman numerals behind the viewer's shoulder, the wall behind the viewer plain and empty, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Master bathroom. One mirror over the sink. Ten years in this house.
scenes.image_prompt: wide interior of a master bathroom with a single mirror over a porcelain sink, white tile floor, cream walls, no clock visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Folded white linen towel. Cream walls. No clock.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a bathroom counter with a folded white linen towel, dim overhead vanity light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Brushing my teeth two weeks ago. Saw it in the mirror. Wood frame. Roman numerals.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a bathroom mirror reflecting an old wood framed wall clock with Roman numerals, faint clock face visible behind the viewer's shoulder, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a cream colored bathroom wall, completely bare, no fixtures or clock visible, soft ambient light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Turned back. The clock was still there in the reflection.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a bathroom mirror reflecting the same wall clock from a slightly different angle, the wall behind it visible in the reflection, vertical 9:16 framing
close shot of a hand holding a smartphone aimed at a bathroom mirror, the screen displaying a live photograph mode, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Photo of the mirror shows the clock. Photo of the wall is blank.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a phone screen displaying two photographs side by side, one of a mirror with a clock visible in it, one of an empty wall, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I started watching. The hands move. They are an hour ahead of mine.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a bathroom mirror at evening light, the reflected wall clock hands clearly visible at a position different than expected, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Yesterday the hands matched mine for the first time.
scenes.image_prompt: close detail of a bathroom mirror at night, the reflected clock hands at a position matching the actual time, the bathroom dim behind the mirror, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I covered the mirror this morning.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a bathroom mirror covered with a white bed sheet held in place with masking tape, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I can hear it ticking through the cloth.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a sheet covered bathroom mirror at night, soft ambient hallway light spilling through the doorway, no figures, vertical 9:16 framing
